mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reimburse_invoice WHERE deleted = 0 AND reimburse_id = #{reimburseId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO reimburse_invoice ( id, reimburse_id, reimburse_item_id, ocr_record_id, invoice_type, invoice_type_name, invoice_no, invoice_code, invoice_date, invoice_date_str, total_amount, pretax_amount, tax_amount, tax_rate, currency, seller_name, seller_tax_id, buyer_name, buyer_tax_id, ocr_confidence, source, file_url, file_name, verified, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.reimburseId}, #{item.reimburseItemId}, #{item.ocrRecordId}, #{item.invoiceType}, #{item.invoiceTypeName}, #{item.invoiceNo}, #{item.invoiceCode}, #{item.invoiceDate}, #{item.invoiceDateStr}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.pretaxAmount}, #{item.taxAmount}, #{item.taxRate}, #{item.currency}, #{item.sellerName}, #{item.sellerTaxId}, #{item.buyerName}, #{item.buyerTaxId}, #{item.ocrConfidence}, #{item.source}, #{item.fileUrl}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.verified}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE reimburse_invoice SET verified = #{verified}, verified_by = #{verifiedBy}, verify_remark = #{verifyRemark}, verified_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
